microsoft_ft: Served as the **technical voice** for Azure enterprise resilience, leading discovery and solution demos with Fortune 500 partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to translate complex recovery requirements into deployed AI-powered validation systems driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining APIs, self-service scheduling requirements, and integration architecture that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable enterprise customer onboarding.

Built and deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring LLM-powered workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly demonstrating enterprise AI value to stakeholders.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, communicating technical architecture to both business and engineering audiences.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by aligning cloud platform, hardware, and operations teams around a new continuous-validation model.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-powered solution adoption** by conducting live product demos and training sessions that drove LLM-based code generation utilization across 14 enterprise teams, saving **37 engineering hours monthly** and building stakeholder trust in new AI workflows.

Led 11+ technical discovery sessions with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the **product roadmap** to prioritize intent-based YAML generation — translating customer pain points into actionable AI use cases.

Accelerated enterprise knowledge retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search platform** with rigorous API and metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and showcasing tangible LLM-powered value to internal customers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** by securing cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, launching cloud regions 28% faster and demonstrating clear business value to enterprise stakeholders.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, translating customer pain points into a structured automation roadmap that addressed the highest-impact operational gaps across the platform.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a real-time view to prioritize automation investments and communicate solution value to both technical and business audiences.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping API dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating the ability to architect and communicate complex technical solutions under enterprise constraints.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing integration friction across cross-functional teams.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized a backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and ensuring on-time delivery of a mission-critical platform transition.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, translating customer operational pain points into a scalable sales process — mirroring the discovery-to-solution motion central to enterprise pre-sales.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search visibility to connect prospect needs with the right solution narrative.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering data-backed recommendations that improved leadership pricing models and demonstrated the value of structured financial discovery.
